articles.title: REGISTER FOR THE WORKSHOP (LIMITED SPOTS, HURRY!)
OPENAI SORA
articles.summary: OpenAI released a new video generation model with stunning quality. It is currently available for red teamers to test.

articles.title: LAMBDA LABS RAISES $320M
articles.summary: Lambda Labs raised a $320M Series C to continue building a powerful GPU cloud.

articles.title: US SAYS AI MODELS CAN’T HOLD PATENTS
articles.summary: The United States Patent and Trademark Office has issued guidance stating that only natural persons who significantly contribute to an invention's conception can be named as inventors. The guidance explicitly excludes AI systems from inventorship despite their role in the creative process.

articles.title: AUTOMATED UNIT TEST IMPROVEMENT USING LARGE LANGUAGE MODELS AT META
articles.summary: Meta used large language models to write tests for its code base. It found substantial improvements in test coverage and overall code quality.

articles.title: META’S V-JEPA MODEL
articles.summary: Meta’s VP & Chief AI Scientist Yann LeCun has previously said that we need more data-efficient self-supervised models for general intelligence. This work is one step towards that, with models trained on video to understand aspects of the world. The models are publicly available.

articles.title: VIDEO COMPRESSION WITH DIFFUSION MODELS
articles.summary: Researchers have developed a new video compression method using diffusion models that generate high-quality video frames while maintaining low data rates.

articles.title: DINOSAUR: DIFFERENTIABLE DYNAMICS FOR GLOBAL ATMOSPHERIC MODELING
articles.summary: The Google team has released code to help with atmospheric modeling. The code is used as the core in DeepMind’s recent weather modeling tools.

articles.title: NEURAL FLOW
articles.summary: This is a Python script for plotting the intermediate layer outputs of Mistral 7B. It produces a 512 x 256 image representing the output at every layer of the model.

articles.title: DECODING BRAIN ACTIVITY ACROSS MULTIPLE SUBJECTS
articles.summary: Researchers have introduced CLIP-MUSED, a novel method for decoding visual information from the brain across different individuals.

articles.title: UPSTASH RAISES $10M FROM A16Z, WHILE LAUNCHING SERVERLESS VECTOR DATABASE
articles.summary: Upstash aims to be a crucial part of AI applications. It offers serverless solutions for vector databases, caching, and rate limiting. Upstash is set to become an even more integral component of AI technology infrastructure with its new vector database.

articles.title: SPEEDING UP LLMS
articles.summary: SLEB is a new method to streamline large language models by pruning redundant transformer blocks.

articles.title: COHERE FOR AI LAUNCHES AYA, AN LLM COVERING MORE THAN 100 LANGUAGES
articles.summary: Cohere’s non-profit research lab C4AI released a model called Aya, a new state-of-the-art open-source massively multilingual research LLM that covers 101 languages – including more than 50 previously underserved languages.

articles.title: SAM ALTMAN OWNS OPENAI’S VENTURE CAPITAL FUND
articles.summary: Sam Altman is the sole owner of OpenAI’s venture capital fund.

articles.title: NEW POLICY FOR EFFICIENT LLMS
articles.summary: RoCo is a robust cache omission policy that enhances the efficiency of large language models in limited-resource environments.

articles.title: AUTOTAB (PRODUCT)
articles.summary: Teach AI to do anything in the browser.
